title: evolvulus serpylloides
intro: Evolvulus serpylloides, commonly known as Dwarf Blue Daze or Dwarf Blue Myrtle, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Bignoniaceae family. It is native to Mexico and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Evolvulus serpylloides can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
